slides.headline: Mental Health Resources: What VASCOs Need to Know
slides.body: Discover key resources and protocols to support student veteran mental health.

slides.headline: Recognize Warning Signs
slides.body: Identify common mental health issues in student veterans. Learn to spot early warning signs.

slides.headline: Understand Referral Protocols
slides.body: Learn to refer students to appropriate mental health professionals. Familiarize with local resources.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Offer emotional support and resources. Encourage students to seek help.

slides.headline: Stay Informed
slides.body: Stay updated on mental health policies and resources. Access the latest VA guidance.

slides.headline: Professional Development
slides.body: Enhance your skills in supporting student veterans. Consider professional development opportunities.

outline.caption: Discover mental health resources and support protocols to help student veterans. Learn how to recognize warning signs, understand referral protocols, and offer support.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, which could benefit from a more engaging headline to draw attention.
